arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up in Premier League fixture vs Liverpool
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Man United take on arch rivals Liverpool at Anfield in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Safety meeting to be held amid Liverpool vs Manchester United weather concerns
arts.sum: Those travelling to Anfield have been told to check the latest travel advice in light of the snow that has fallen overnight.

arts.ttl: 'I made Liverpool boss choke in shock after I turned them down for Man Utd'
arts.sum: Liverpool believed they were on the verge of signing Cristiano Ronaldo from Sporting CP in 2003 - and the winger joining Manchester United surprised Reds boss Gerard Houllier

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Arne Slot's assistant makes decision as exit talks emerge
arts.sum: Liverpool are set for a busy January transfer window, with plenty of focus on the futures of Trent Alexander-Arnold, Virgil van Dijk and Mohamed Salah who are all out of contract in the summer

arts.ttl: Sunday’s briefing: Arteta and Postecoglou fume and Liverpool look to extend lead
arts.sum: Arsenal’s draw at Brighton could allow Liverpool to pull further clear at the top of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'A lot of anxiety' - Manchester United and Ruben Amorim must deliver on pledge at Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester United face Liverpool at Anfield on Sunday and must solve a crucial issue to have any chance of finding a positive result

arts.ttl: 'It was a good day' - How Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim avoids Pep Guardiola pitfall
arts.sum: The stress levels have been rising in the dugouts of Man United and Manchester City this season and Ruben Amorim has spoken of how he tries to switch off.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson wanted to sack his own Man Utd player after blazing Liverpool dressing room row
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson once told Peter Schmeichel he'd have to sack him following a blazing row in the Anfield away dressing room after a draw with Liverpool

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Marcus Rashford latest as Ruben Amorim told to make change
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim faces the daunting prospect of facing Liverpool on Sunday afternoon and the Manchester United head coach is again being told it is wise to change his captain

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool face rivals Man Utd in the Premier League. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.
